svg.title: Chat history flow
svg.desc: VLegalAI · explicit separation between temporary guest history and durable encrypted conversational memory
svg.text: VLegalAI · explicit separation between temporary guest history and durable encrypted conversational memory

text.tspan: Guest = browser-only temporary history. Authenticated = durable encrypted transcript + rolling semantic summary.
No conversation, message or summary rows are written.

g.text: Encrypt and UPSERT one conversation_summary row

text.tspan: Full transcript remains durable even if summary refresh fails.
